lipitor.rationale: Generic statin equivalent with lower cash pricing at most pharmacies

crestor.rationale: Generic option typically lowers co-pay and cash spend

januvia.rationale: Formulary-preferred alternatives can significantly reduce patient cost

humalog.rationale: Authorized equivalents are often cheaper with comparable efficacy

eliquis.alternative: Apixaban generic (when available) or formulary anticoagulant
eliquis.rationale: Checking preferred anticoagulants can reduce monthly spend

advair.rationale: Generic combination inhalers are often cheaper

pharmacy.rationale: Longer fills and mail-order can reduce dispensing markups
